# Codex Safe Check

Codex Safe Check is a read-only Codex CLI diagnostic collector for install,
login, proxy, custom CA, CODEX_HOME, and connectivity problems.

English page:
https://yaoguai-xh.github.io/codex-safe-check/

Chinese page:
https://yaoguai-xh.github.io/codex-safe-check/zh.html

Paid diagnosis workflow:
https://yaoguai-xh.github.io/codex-safe-check/paid-diagnosis.html

Sample diagnosis report:
https://yaoguai-xh.github.io/codex-safe-check/sample-report.html

Release:
https://github.com/yaoguai-xh/codex-safe-check/releases/tag/v1.0.1

Direct ZIP:
https://github.com/yaoguai-xh/codex-safe-check/releases/download/v1.0.1/codex-diagnostic-customer-kit-v1.0.1.zip

SHA256SUMS:
https://github.com/yaoguai-xh/codex-safe-check/releases/download/v1.0.1/SHA256SUMS.txt

Paid diagnosis status:
https://github.com/yaoguai-xh/codex-safe-check/issues/2

Boundary: do not send passwords, one-time codes, API keys, access tokens,
cookies, identity documents, auth files, full logs, full configuration, source
code, screenshots containing account details, usernames, hostnames, working
directories, proxy addresses, or payment details.
